properties.name: clickable-box
properties.description: Sets the whole box to be clickable

properties.name: connotation
properties.description: Controls the color of the box and its control

properties.name: control-type
properties.description: Controls the type of control in the box

properties.name: control-placement
properties.description: Controls where the control should be placed in the box

properties.name: tight
properties.description: Removes the padding from the boxes content area

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Controls the disabled state of the box and its control

events.name: change
events.description: Fired when the checked state changes

slots.name: default
slots.description: Content area for the Selectable Box
